overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person metro train ride through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The camera pans across the train interior showing other passengers, then views the passing urban landscape with large billboards and industrial structures, before arriving at a station platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior with seating and digital displays

events.description: camera pans left across the train interior revealing the opposite side with standing passengers
standing passenger in dark coat briefly blocks the view during the pan

agents.ego_description: seated on the metro train, observing the interior and other passengers

notable_agents.action: passenger in yellow jacket seated across, looking at a handheld device
standing passenger in dark coat and cap holding onto overhead handrail

entered.detail: brown upholstered bench seats along the train walls
sliding glass doors with metal frames at the end of the train car
illuminated information display showing route details above the doors
yellow vertical poles and horizontal bars for standing passengers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic metro train car with the camera panning slowly from right to left. Brown upholstered seats line the walls, and digital displays show route information above the sliding doors. A passenger in a yellow jacket sits across from the camera, while another passenger in a dark coat stands holding the overhead handrails. Neon billboards are visible flashing past the windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train view of neon-lit commercial district

events.description: camera shifts focus from interior to exterior view through the train window
train passes large purple billboard with 'SET SAIL' text and figure image

agents.ego_description: looking out the train window at the passing neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: tall commercial buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage
large purple billboard with 'SET SAIL' text and stylized figure image
multi-level road infrastructure with green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to focus on the exterior view through the train window, showing the train moving through a dense urban commercial district. Tall buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage pass by, including a prominent purple 'SET SAIL' billboard. The train travels on elevated tracks alongside multi-level highway infrastructure with green lighting accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial urban corridor alongside chain-link fencing

events.description: train passes large illuminated orange 'BARRIER & FERGUSON' sign on chain-link fence
ambient lighting decreases as train enters darker section of the urban track

agents.ego_description: continuing to view the urban landscape as the train passes industrial areas

notable_agents.action: passenger with braided hair and yellow pants seated by window, drinking from a bottle

entered.detail: large illuminated orange sign reading 'BARRIER & FERGUSON' mounted on chain-link fencing
metal mesh security fencing running alongside the train tracks
concrete industrial structures with minimal lighting and ventilation equipment

segments.scene_description: The train continues through an industrial section of the city, passing a large illuminated 'BARRIER & FERGUSON' sign mounted on chain-link fencing that runs alongside the tracks. The environment becomes darker with less neon lighting, showing concrete industrial buildings. A passenger with braided hair sits near the window drinking from a bottle.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro station platform with medical facility entrance

events.description: train arrives at the MEDCENTER station platform with waiting passengers visible
train decelerates and comes to a complete stop at the station platform

agents.ego_description: arriving at the station, observing the platform and waiting passengers

notable_agents.action: two passengers seated on platform bench waiting for the train
security guard standing near the MEDCENTER entrance monitoring the platform

entered.detail: metro station platform with teal and yellow color scheme and concrete flooring
illuminated teal sign reading 'MEDCENTER' above the platform entrance
metal seating areas on the station platform for waiting passengers
illuminated commercial poster on the station wall

segments.scene_description: The train approaches and arrives at the MEDCENTER station platform, slowing down as it pulls in. The platform features teal and yellow signage, concrete flooring, and several waiting passengers seated on benches. A security guard stands near the entrance, and the station is lit by artificial lighting fixtures. The train comes to a complete stop, ending the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the interior of a futuristic metro train through a neon-lit urban sprawl and into a sterile transit station. It begins with a slow pan across the train car, passing brown upholstered seats and passengers in yellow and dark clothing while digital displays flicker above the doors. As the camera shifts focus toward the window, the view expands into a dense commercial district filled with illuminated skyscrapers and a prominent purple SET SAIL billboard overlooking multi-level highways. The scene then transitions into a darker industrial zone, passing concrete buildings and a large BARRIER & FERGUSON sign along chain-link fencing before gliding past a passenger with braided hair. Finally, the train slows as it pulls into the MEDCENTER station, where the neon city gives way to artificial lighting, teal and yellow signage, and waiting passengers on a concrete platform.
